narrative:
Centerville City has 19,827 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
